subtitle: every human who ever lived, resurrected on one endless River
author: Philip José Farmer
premise: Thirty-six billion of the dead wake naked and twenty-five years old on the banks of a River ten million miles long. Grailstones feed them; death only moves them elsewhere up the River. Someone built this. The quest is to reach the tower at the headwaters and learn who, and why.
note: The full Riverworld saga (5 novels, 1971–1983) sorted by role on the River, with the renegade X set apart. roster.json is the source of truth. Characters by Philip José Farmer (and history); inspiration only.

classes.label: The Builders
classes.spec: the riverboat and the long dream

classes.label: The Tyrants
classes.spec: who seize the River by force

classes.label: The Second Chance
classes.spec: redemption, and the refusal of violence

classes.label: The Companions
classes.spec: the loyal band from the first morning

classes.label: The Ethicals
classes.spec: the world-builders · the gods of Riverworld

classes.label: The Renegade
classes.spec: the hidden hand behind the quest

members.name: Sir Richard Francis Burton
members.specialty: Explorer, swordsman, linguist; the first to wake before the resurrection finished. He will not stop until he reaches the tower and the truth — dying a thousand deaths up the River and rising each time, still climbing.

members.name: Alice Hargreaves
members.specialty: The real Alice of Wonderland, resurrected at twenty-five; Burton's first companion on the bank, and no one's idea of a child.

members.name: Peter Jairus Frigate
members.specialty: A twentieth-century writer — and the author's own shadow on the River; the chronicler who keeps the record of the quest.

members.name: Nur ed-Din el-Musafir
members.specialty: Moorish Sufi master; the calm at the band's center; teacher of the discipline the Ethicals themselves came to fear.

members.name: Samuel Clemens (Mark Twain)
members.specialty: Haunted by a vision of a great riverboat; bargains for the iron of a fallen meteorite to build the Not For Hire and steam ten million miles to the headwaters.

members.name: Lothar von Richthofen
members.specialty: The Red Baron's brother; airman and aristocrat; Clemens's friend and the dream's wings.

members.name: Milton Firebrass
members.specialty: Engineer of the impossible; aircraft, airship, and the long iron machine that would carry them to the tower.

members.name: King John
members.specialty: The treacherous Plantagenet; steals Clemens's first riverboat and races him north; villainy resurrected wholly unchanged.

members.name: The River Kingdoms
members.specialty: The slaver-states and petty tyrannies that rise on the banks — proof that a second life does not, by itself, grant a second soul.

members.name: La Viro (Jacques Gillot)
members.specialty: Founder of the Church of the Second Chance; preaches that the resurrection is a chance to become better, and that violence forfeits it.

members.name: Hermann Göring
members.specialty: The Reichsmarschall, resurrected; tyrant and addict who, through the Church of the Second Chance, claws toward something like redemption — the saga's hardest, most insisted-upon mercy.

members.name: Kazz
members.specialty: Kazzintuitruaabemss — a Paleolithic man, nearly the last of his kind; Burton's fierce, loyal friend from the very first morning.

members.name: Monat Grrautut
members.specialty: The Tau Cetan; the alien who once sterilized Earth and now wanders the River in sorrow; Burton's wisest friend.

members.name: Cyrano de Bergerac
members.specialty: The finest blade on the River, and a finer poet than his legend — proud, loyal, and exactly as advertised.

members.name: Tom Mix
members.specialty: The cowboy film star, resurrected; rope, grin, and grit, riding the bank as if it were a back lot.

members.name: Gilgamesh
members.specialty: King of Uruk, oldest of the named; even he is twenty-five again, naked on the grass, beginning a second time.

members.name: The Council of Twelve
members.specialty: The posthuman world-builders who raised every human who ever lived and watch the experiment from the tower at the headwaters.

members.name: The Agents
members.specialty: Ethical operatives walking the River disguised as the resurrected, guarding the secret of why any of this was done.

members.name: X · the Mysterious Stranger
members.specialty: One of the twelve who broke faith with his own kind. The hidden hand that woke Burton early, recruited a chosen few, and gave humanity a path to the truth — Loga, the renegade god of the second chance, on whom the whole saga secretly turns.
